title: helianthemum vulgare var. scopolii
intro: Helianthemum vulgare var. scopolii, also known as Rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Rockrose plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum vulgare var. scopolii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
